summary: Iteration 4 testing: server.py modular refactoring regression, video search/filter, upload resume status, PlayLab webhook auto-sync. Fixed critical frontend compilation error (duplicate component declarations in PlayLabIntegration.jsx). All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified.

critical_bug_fixed.issue: CodeBlock and PlayLabIntegration components declared TWICE in same file (lines 1-359 first version with webhook + lines 361-636 second version without webhook). Caused SyntaxError: Identifier 'CodeBlock' has already been declared at line 361. Frontend was COMPLETELY BROKEN - failed to compile.
critical_bug_fixed.fix: Removed lines 361-636 (duplicate second version without webhook). Kept lines 1-359 which includes the new webhook section.
critical_bug_fixed.root_cause: Main agent appended new webhook code to the existing file instead of replacing it, resulting in both old and new versions co-existing.

minor.issue: Potential HMAC signature mismatch: signature computed over compact JSON (json.dumps with separators=(',',':')) but payload sent via httpx json= parameter which uses its own serialization. If recipients verify signatures, they may fail. Low priority since webhook_secret is optional.

issues: data-testid='status-filter' and data-testid='sort-order' are placed on the Radix UI <Select> wrapper, NOT on the <SelectTrigger> button. The testid doesn't appear on any rendered DOM element, reducing testability. Should move data-testid to <SelectTrigger>.

Resume/retry messaging ('Checking for resumable upload...', 'Resuming upload...', 'Network error — retrying chunk...') is DYNAMIC-only, visible only during active upload. No static indication of resume capability in the idle UI. By design but spec says 'visible in UI'.

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns status=healthy
POST /api/auth/login with StreamHost/TestPass123!@# returns access_token
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/videos returns list (authenticated)
GET /api/videos?search=test returns only matching videos (title/desc regex filter)
GET /api/videos?status=ready returns only ready videos
GET /api/videos?status=failed returns only failed videos
GET /api/videos?sort=oldest returns ascending date order
GET /api/videos?sort=newest returns descending date order
GET /api/videos?search=no_match returns empty list
GET /api/videos without auth returns 403
GET /api/upload/status/nonexistent returns 404
POST /api/upload/init creates session with upload_id and video_id
GET /api/upload/status/{upload_id} returns chunks_received=[] for new session
GET /api/upload/status without auth returns 403
GET /api/playlab/settings includes webhook_url field
PATCH /api/playlab/webhook with url+secret returns 200 with message
GET /api/playlab/settings shows updated webhook_url after PATCH
POST /api/playlab/test-webhook with no URL configured returns 400
POST /api/playlab/test-webhook with httpbin.org/post returns success HTTP 200
PATCH /api/playlab/webhook with empty url clears it
Regression: POST /api/auth/login still works after module split
Regression: GET /api/folders still works
Regression: GET /api/mesh/status still works
Regression: GET /api/mesh/nodes still works (returns {local_node, remote_nodes})
Regression: GET /api/playlab/videos still works
Regression: POST /api/upload/init still works
Frontend: Video Library loads with search bar visible (data-testid=video-search-input)
Frontend: Typing in search bar filters videos (debounced 300ms)
Frontend: Clear filters button appears when search/filter/sort is non-default
Frontend: Status filter dropdown selects 'Failed' (via role=option selector)
Frontend: Sort dropdown changes to 'Oldest First'
Frontend: Upload page loads with drop zone, title, description, folder, upload button
Frontend: PlayLab page loads with webhook section (URL input, secret input, save btn, test btn)
Frontend: Save Webhook saves settings and shows 'Webhook settings saved' toast
Frontend: Test Webhook sends to httpbin.org and shows 'Delivered! HTTP 200' result
Frontend: Storage Mesh page loads with Total Storage Pool, local node card (Online)
Frontend: All 6 sidebar nav items navigate correctly (Library, Upload, Folders, Mesh, PlayLab, Settings)

hmac_investigation.claim: services.py has a bug in line calling hmac.new()
hmac_investigation.finding: hmac.new(key, msg, digestmod) is valid Python 3.11 and returns HMAC object with .hexdigest(). Confirmed working with direct test. No runtime error.
hmac_investigation.actual_risk: The signature body_bytes uses compact JSON (separators=(',',':')) but httpx json= parameter serializes differently. HMAC will be computed over compact JSON but payload sent may differ. Recipients verifying signatures may fail.

action_items: Consider adding a static note/badge on Upload page about resume capability (e.g., 'Supports auto-resume on network failure')
Fix data-testid placement: move from <Select> wrapper to <SelectTrigger> in VideoLibrary.jsx for proper testability
MEDIUM: Fix HMAC signature in _trigger_playlab_webhook(): either use body_bytes to send the request (raw mode) or recompute signature from httpx-serialized body to avoid mismatch
critical_code_review_comments: PlayLabIntegration.jsx had duplicate component definitions - FIXED in this iteration
data-testid on Radix UI <Select> wrapper does not propagate to rendered DOM button - affects all Select components in VideoLibrary.jsx

HMAC signature in _trigger_playlab_webhook() is computed over compact JSON but sent via httpx json= parameter - these use different serialization, causing signature mismatch when webhook_secret is configured
UploadVideo.jsx: resume messaging (retry logic, 3x exponential backoff) is fully implemented but only visible during active upload - no static affordance in idle UI

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; minor testid placement note)

seed_data_creation: TEST_Resume Upload Test and TEST_Status Check Upload and TEST_Regression Upload sessions created in db.uploads during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 tested: modular refactoring (all routes still work), video search/filter, upload resume status, PlayLab webhook. Password: TestPass123!@#. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py. PlayLabIntegration.jsx was fixed - duplicate definitions removed. Webhook is currently set to https://httpbin.org/post from this test run - may want to clear it. Previous test files: test_chunked_upload.py, test_mesh_playlab.py. Design: dark theme, good contrast, clean layout.
